subcodes.title: Answer to questions, New York, 1912-05-30
subcodes.first_line: My health and happiness depend on the progress of the Cause of God. Nothing else merits attention. This happiness is eternal, and this life is life everlasting.
subcodes.first_line_orig: صحت و مسرت من در پیشرفت امر الله است امور سائره قابل توجه نه این سرور سرور ابدیست و این حیات حیات سرمدی
subcodes.subjects: @disregarding bodily comfort, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @attaining the life of the spirit, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
